prompt: A dice has letters A, B, C, R, S and T on its sides. Two different positions of the same dice are shown below. Select the letter that will be on the face opposite to the one having A.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर A, B, C, R, S और T लिखे हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। A वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: Letter A is common in both the dice and is on the same front surface. Therefore, the corresponding surfaces are opposite to each other: C is opposite to R, and B is opposite to S. The remaining letter T is opposite to A.

prompt: What would be the word on the opposite side of 'Blue' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो 'नीला' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सा शब्द होगा?
reason: When the sheet is folded along the lines, alternate surfaces in a straight line are opposite to each other. Red is opposite to Pink, and Green is opposite to White. The remaining face Blue is opposite to Black.

prompt: What would be the letter on the opposite side of 'K' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो 'K' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सा अक्षर होगा?
reason: Using the alternate surfaces rule for open dice nets: in the vertical column, K is opposite to M, and J is opposite to L. In the remaining blocks, H is opposite to I. Thus, K is opposite to M.

prompt: What would be the number on the opposite side of '20' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो '20' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सी संख्या आएगी?
reason: Following the alternate surface rule: 21 is opposite to 20, and 22 is opposite to 24. The remaining surfaces 23 and 25 are opposite to each other. Hence, 21 is opposite to 20.

prompt: What would be the symbol on the opposite side of '@' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो '@' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सा प्रतीक आएगा?
reason: Based on the structure, the vertical alternate faces are # opposite to }, and ^ opposite to *. The remaining faces @ and & are opposite to each other.

prompt: What would be the symbol on the opposite side of '@' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो '@' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सा प्रतीक आएगा?
reason: According to the alternate surface rule in open dice: * is opposite to @, and # is opposite to $. The remaining symbols ^ and % are opposite to each other. Therefore, * is opposite to @.

prompt: What would be the letter on the opposite side of 'R' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो 'R' के विपरीत ओर कौन सा अक्षर होगा?
reason: Using the alternate surface rule: U is opposite to S, and T is opposite to P. The remaining faces Q and R are opposite to each other. Hence, Q is opposite to R.

prompt: What would be the number on the opposite side of '30' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है, तो '30' के विपरीत फलक पर संख्या क्या होगी?
reason: By following the alternate faces rule: 25 is opposite to 28, and 30 is opposite to 26. The remaining numbers 27 and 29 are opposite to each other. Therefore, 26 is opposite to 30.

prompt: On folding the given die, which letter will be opposite to the letter K?
prompt_hi: दिए गए पासे को मोड़ने पर कौन सा अक्षर K के विपरीत होगा?
reason: In the open dice, the alternate faces in the horizontal rows are opposite: J is opposite to O, and T is opposite to H. The remaining adjacent blocks fold to be opposite: K is opposite to M.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice are given below. Find the number opposite of 8.
prompt_hi: नीचे एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 8 के विपरीत संख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: Number 5 is common in both dice. Rotating clockwise from 5 in the first dice gives 5 -> 7 -> 6. Rotating clockwise from 5 in the second dice gives 5 -> 8 -> 9. Therefore, 7 is opposite to 8, and 6 is opposite to 9.

prompt: Three different positions of the same dice are given below. Find the number opposite of 1.
prompt_hi: नीचे एक ही पासे की तीन अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 1 के विपरीत संख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: Comparing the first and second dice, the numbers 2 and 3 are common on both. Thus, the remaining faces 1 and 6 must be opposite to each other.

prompt: Six numbers 2, 3, 5, 7, 8 and 9 are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure. Which is the number on the face opposite to the face containing 5?
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह संख्याएँ 2, 3, 5, 7, 8 और 9 लिखी हैं। इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ चित्र में दर्शाई गई हैं। 5 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सी संख्या है?
reason: Number 5 is common in both dice. The faces adjacent to 5 are 9, 8, 7, and 2. Therefore, the only remaining number from the set is 3, which must be opposite to 5.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice with faces 3, 7, 8, 2, 9 and 4 are shown below. Select the number that will be on the face opposite to the one having 4.
prompt_hi: नीचे 3, 7, 8, 2, 9 और 4 फलकों वाले एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। वह संख्या चुनें जो 4 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर होगी।
reason: Number 8 is common on the right face of both dice. Rotating clockwise from 8 gives 8 -> 3 -> 7 for the first dice, and 8 -> 2 -> 9 for the second dice. This means 3 is opposite to 2, and 7 is opposite to 9. The remaining number is 4, which is opposite to 8.

prompt: Two positions of a dice are given below. What will come on the face opposite to the face containing '3' on it?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। '3' वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर क्या आएगा?
reason: In both dice, numbers 4 and 5 are common. Therefore, the remaining numbers on the respective dice must be opposite to each other. Hence, 6 is opposite to 3.

prompt: On folding the given dice, which number will be opposite to the number '20'?
prompt_hi: दिए गए पासे को मोड़ने पर कौन सी संख्या '20' के विपरीत होगी?
reason: Using the rule for unfolded dice nets: horizontal alternates 10 and 30 are opposite. Vertical alternates 40 and 60 are opposite. The remaining numbers 20 and 50 are opposite to each other.

prompt: Three positions of a dice are given below. What will come on the face opposite to the face containing 'F' on it?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक पासे की तीन स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 'F' वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर क्या आएगा?
reason: Comparing dice 1 and 2, F is common and on the same top face. This means H and P are opposite. From dice 2 and 3, P is common; rotating clockwise gives P -> I -> F and P -> N -> M. So, F is opposite to M.

prompt: What is opposite to 'V' when the given figure is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: जब दी गई आकृति को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाता है तो 'V' के विपरीत क्या होगा?
reason: Applying the alternate surface rule for open nets: X is opposite to W, and Z is opposite to U. The remaining faces V and Y fold to be opposite each other.

prompt: Six numbers 1, 2, 5, 6, 8 and 9 are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this are shown in the figure. Which is the number on the face opposite to the face containing 8?
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह संख्याएँ 1, 2, 5, 6, 8 और 9 लिखी हैं। आकृति में इसकी दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। 8 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सी संख्या है?
reason: Number 1 is common on the front face of both dice. This means the corresponding faces are opposite: the top face 6 is opposite to top face 5, and the right face 8 is opposite to the right face 2.

prompt: Two positions of a dice are given below. What will come on the face opposite to the face containing 'K' on it?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। K वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर क्या आएगा?
reason: V is common in both dice. Rotating clockwise from V in the first dice (where V is on the right) yields V -> Q -> P. In the second dice (where V is on the top), rotating clockwise yields V -> K -> R. Therefore, Q is opposite to K.

prompt: What would be the word on the opposite side of 'Run' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो 'Run' के विपरीत कौन सा शब्द होगा?
reason: In the central column, Fly is opposite to Play, and Cry is opposite to Eat. This leaves the outer blocks Pray and Run to be opposite to each other.

prompt: What would be the word on the opposite side of 'Pear' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो 'Pear' के विपरीत दिशा में कौन सा शब्द होगा?
reason: According to the alternate surface rule for the left column, Pear is opposite to Lime, and Kiwi is opposite to Plum. For the right column elements, Mango is opposite to Melon.

prompt: What would be the symbol on the opposite side of '*' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो '*' के विपरीत ओर क्या चिह्न होगा?
reason: In the vertical column, the alternate faces are opposite: * is opposite to $, and ¥ is opposite to #. The remaining faces @ and % are opposite to each other.

prompt: What would be the word on the opposite side of 'Eat' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो 'Eat' के विपरीत ओर कौन सा शब्द होगा?
reason: Using the alternate surfaces rule on the central column: Eat is opposite to Fly, and Run is opposite to Pray. The remaining outer faces Play and Cry are opposite to each other.

prompt: What would be the symbol on the opposite side of '@' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो '@' के विपरीत ओर क्या प्रतीक होगा?
reason: Following the alternate surface rule: in the left column, $ is opposite to %. In the right column, ^ is opposite to #. The remaining faces @ and * correspond as opposite sides.

prompt: What would be the letter on the opposite side of 'N' if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?
prompt_hi: यदि दी गई शीट को मोड़कर घन बनाया जाए तो 'N' के विपरीत ओर कौन सा अक्षर होगा?
reason: Based on the unfolded net rules: in the left vertical alignment, M is opposite to N. In the right vertical alignment, O is opposite to L. The remaining adjacent pieces fold to make P opposite to K.
